overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, featuring a vehicle journey through elevated highways and underpasses in a futuristic neon-lit city during golden hour sunset. The footage transitions from covered urban canyons to open highway sections with moderate traffic density and futuristic architecture.

transition from artificial lighting to natural golden hour sunlight

covered walkway with transparent panels on the right side
tall digital advertisement structure with glowing red and cyan displays
tall futuristic buildings with reflective glass facades forming a canyon around the road

segments.scene_description: Driving through a covered elevated highway corridor enclosed by futuristic glass skyscrapers. The scene is dominated by artificial lighting from neon billboards and street lights. A flying vehicle passes overhead between the buildings as the car approaches the exit to open sky.

scene_state.functional_zone: open elevated highway with overhead signage and multiple levels

events.description: entering Little China district as indicated by on-screen text notification
approaching dense overpass structure with multiple stacked highway levels

agents.ego_description: cruising on open elevated highway during sunset with moderate traffic flow

notable_agents.action: black car braking ahead on the highway
yellow taxi overtaking in the left lane

entered.detail: green directional traffic signs suspended over the highway lanes
massive concrete and steel overpass spanning across the highway
multiple large digital advertisement screens on building facades
thick concrete pillars supporting the upper highway decks

segments.scene_description: The scene opens up to golden hour sunlight as the vehicle exits the covered corridor onto an open elevated highway. Green overhead signs and massive support structures dominate the view. The on-screen text indicates entry into the Little China district, with digital billboards visible on the left and traffic flowing in both directions.

scene_state.functional_zone: enclosed highway underpass with artificial lighting

events.description: entering covered underpass section with reduced natural lighting
exiting underpass back into golden hour sunlight

agents.ego_description: navigating through enclosed underpass with artificial lighting and reduced visibility

entered.detail: smooth grey concrete walls lining the right side of the underpass
linear arrays of fluorescent lights illuminating the tunnel ceiling
enclosed concrete tunnel with multiple lanes passing under buildings

segments.scene_description: The vehicle enters a covered underpass section where artificial lighting replaces the natural sunset glow. Concrete walls line the right side while overhead fixtures provide illumination. The enclosed space creates a tunnel-like environment before opening up again to the outside.

scene_state.functional_zone: open elevated highway with panoramic city and mountain views

events.description: exiting underpass into open highway with expansive views of the city skyline
distant flying vehicles visible in the sky above the industrial district

agents.ego_description: driving on open highway with clear view of sunset, distant mountains, and cityscape

notable_agents.action: black SUV driving ahead on the open highway

entered.detail: futuristic towers and industrial structures visible on the horizon
hazy mountains silhouetted against the sunset sky beyond the city
green metal safety railing along the right edge of the elevated highway
tall industrial structures and smokestacks in the distance

segments.scene_description: The final segment opens up to a breathtaking panoramic view of the distant city skyline against a golden hour sunset. The highway stretches forward with mountains visible in the far background. The scene transitions from enclosed urban infrastructure to an expansive vista of the futuristic cityscape with industrial towers and flying vehicles in the distance.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous drive through a futuristic city that shifts from enclosed neon corridors to an expansive golden hour vista. It begins within a covered elevated highway enclosed by glass skyscrapers and artificial neon billboards, with a flying vehicle gliding overhead as the car approaches the exit. As the vehicle breaks free from the urban canyon, the scene opens into the brilliant glow of a sunset over the Little China district, passing under massive support structures and green overhead signs. The environment then contracts as the car enters a concrete underpass where artificial fixtures replace the natural light, creating a brief tunnel-like transition. Finally, the highway opens up once more to reveal a breathtaking panoramic view of the distant city skyline and mountains under a golden sky, dotted with industrial towers and flying vehicles.
